Haelam is located in the village of Tadrent. Bring the wood back to Haelam in the village of Tadrent.
The workbench is located near Haelam in Tadrent. Use the workbench to build crates for Haelam.
Haelam is located in the village of Tadrent. Speak with Haelam.
